definition: China's export restrictions on critical minerals follow an escalating sequential pattern — each restriction more severe and targeting processing chokepoints — enabling forward prediction of next steps.
evidence: Documented sequence: Ga/Ge → graphite → antimony → processing tech bans
Each escalation targeting more critical processing stages
Pattern enables forward prediction of next restriction targets
open_questions: What is the next mineral/processing stage in the sequence?
Does each escalation produce diminishing or increasing geopolitical leverage?
